revision.comment: Bot: update Japanese content tags (273 JP chars, buckets: 50+, 100+, 150+, 200+, 250+) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[bcl:Sutra kan puso]][[bn:হৃদয়সূত্র]][[bo:ཤེས་རབ་སྙིང་པོ་]][[bxr:Бэлиг барамидай зүрхэн судар]][[ca:Sutra del cor]][[co:commons:Category:Heart Sutra]][[cs:Sútra srdce]][[de:Herz-Sutra]][[en:Heart Sutra]][[eo:Sutro de la koro de la perfekteco de saĝo]][[es:Sutra del corazón]][[et:Ületava mõistmise südasuutra]][[fa:سوره دل]][[fr:Sūtra du Cœur]][[gan:心經]][[got:𐌷𐌰𐌹𐍂𐍄𐍉𐍃𐌿𐍄𐍂𐌰]][[hi:हृदय सूत्र]][[hu:Szív szútra]][[id:Sutra Hati]][[it:Sutra del Cuore]][[ja:般若心経]][[ka:გულის სუტრა]][[ko:반야심경]][[la:Orsa Cordis]][[mn:Зүрхэн судар]][[ms:Sutra Hati]][[ne:हृदय सूत्र]][[new:प्रज्ञापारमिताहृदयसूत्रम्]][[nl:Hartsoetra]][[no:Hjertesūtraen]][[pl:Sutra Serca]][[pt:Sutra do Coração]][[ru:Сутра сердца]][[si:හෘදය සූත්‍රය]][[te:హృదయ సూత్రం]][[th:ปรัชญาปารมิตาหฤทัยสูตร]][[tr:Kalp Sutra]][[uk:Сутра Серця]][[vi:Bát-nhã tâm kinh]][[wuu:心经]][[zh_classical:般若波羅蜜多心經]][[zh_yue:心經]][[zh:般若波羅蜜多心經]] An interlinear translation of the '''Heart Sūtra''' (心經), based on the text provided, is presented below. This format offers a word-for-word or phrase-by-phrase rendering to closely follow the Classical Chinese structure.
:觀自在菩薩[Bodhisattva]， :Guānzìzài púsà :Avalokiteśvara Bodhisattva,
:行深般若波羅蜜多[Prajñāpāramitā]時， :xíng shēn bōrě bōluómìduō shí, :practicing deep Prajñāpāramitā, at that time,
:照見五蘊皆空， :zhào jiàn wǔ yùn jiē kōng, :illuminated and saw the five aggregates all empty,
:度一切苦厄。 :dù yīqiè kǔ è. :and crossed beyond all suffering and difficulty.
:舍利子[Śāriputra]， :Shèlìzǐ, :Śāriputra,
:色不異空， :sè bù yì kōng, :form does not differ from emptiness,
:空不異色； :kōng bù yì sè; :emptiness does not differ from form;
:色即是空， :sè jí shì kōng, :form is precisely emptiness,
:空即是色。 :kōng jí shì sè. :emptiness is precisely form.
:受、想、行、識， :shòu, xiǎng, xíng, shí, :Feeling, perception, volition, consciousness,
:亦復如是。 :yì fù rú shì. :are also like this.
:舍利子[Śāriputra]， :Sh利lìzǐ, :Śāriputra,
:是諸法空相， :shì zhū fǎ kōng xiāng, :these various phenomena's empty character,
:不生不滅， :bù shēng bù miè, :is not born and not destroyed,
:不垢不淨， :bù gòu bù jìng, :not defiled and not pure,
:不增不減， :bù zēng bù jiǎn. :not increasing and not decreasing.
:是故空中無色， :shì gù kōng zhōng wú sè, :Therefore, within emptiness, there is no form,
:無受、想、行、識； :wú shòu, xiǎng, xíng, shí; :no feeling, perception, volition, consciousness;
:無眼、耳、鼻、舌、身、意； :wú yǎn, ěr, bí, shé, shēn, yì; :no eye, ear, nose, tongue, body, mind;
:無色、聲、香、味、觸、法； :wú sè, shēng, xiāng, wèi, chù, fǎ; :no form, sound, smell, taste, touch, object-of-mind;
:無眼界， :wú yǎn jiè, :no eye-realm,
:乃至無意識界； :nǎizhì wú yìshí jiè; :and so on up to no mind-consciousness-realm;
:無無明， :wú wúmíng, :no ignorance,
:亦無無明盡； :yì wú wúmíng jìn; :and also no extinction of ignorance;
:乃至無老死， :nǎizhì wú lǎo sǐ, :and so on up to no old age and death,
:亦無老死盡。 :yì wú lǎo sǐ jìn. :and also no extinction of old age and death.
:無苦、集、滅、道， :wú kǔ, jí, miè, dào, :No suffering, accumulation, cessation, path,
:無智亦無得， :wú zhì yì wú dé, :no wisdom and also no attainment,
:以無所得故。 :yǐ wú suǒ dé gù. :because there is nothing to be attained.
:菩提薩埵[Bodhisattva]， :Pútísàduǒ, :The Bodhisattva,
:依般若波羅蜜多[Prajñāpāramitā]故， :yī bōrě bōluómìduō gù, :relying on Prajñāpāramitā, therefore,
:心無罣礙， :xīn wú guà ài, :the mind has no hindrance.
:無罣礙故， :wú guà ài gù, :Because there is no hindrance,
:無有恐怖， :wú yǒu kǒngbù, :there is no fear.
:遠離顛倒夢想， :yuǎnlí diāndǎo mèngxiǎng, :Far apart from inverted, deluded thoughts,
:究竟涅槃[Nirvāṇa]。 :jiūjìng nièpán. :one ultimately reaches Nirvāṇa.
:三世諸佛， :sān shì zhū fó, :The Buddhas of the three periods of time,
:依般若波羅蜜多[Prajñāpāramitā]故， :yī bōrě bōluómìduō gù, :relying on Prajñāpāramitā, therefore,
:得阿耨多羅三藐三菩提[Anuttarā Samyaksaṃbodhi]。 :dé ā nòu duō luó sān miǎo sān pútí. :attain Anuttarā Samyaksaṃbodhi (unexcelled, perfect enlightenment).
:故知般若波羅蜜多[Prajñāpāramitā]， :gù zhī bōrě bōluómìduō, :Therefore, know that Prajñāpāramitā,
:是大神咒， :shì dà shén zhòu, :is the great spiritual mantra,
:是大明咒， :shì dà míng zhòu, :the great bright mantra,
:是無上咒， :shì wú shàng zhòu, :the supreme mantra,
:是無等等咒， :shì wú děngděng zhòu, :the unequaled mantra,
:能除一切苦， :néng chú yīqiè kǔ, :which can remove all suffering,
:真實不虛。 :zhēnshí bù xū. :and is true, not false.
:故說般若波羅蜜多咒[Prajñāpāramitā mantra]， :gù shuō bōrě bōluómìduō zhòu, :Therefore, speak the Prajñāpāramitā mantra.
:即說咒曰： :jí shuō zhòu yuē: :That is, speak the mantra, saying:
:揭諦、揭諦，波羅揭諦，波羅僧揭諦，菩提薩婆訶。 :jiēdì, jiēdì, bōluó jiēdì, bōluó sēng jiēdì, pútí sàpóhē. :Gate, gate, pāragate, pārasaṃgate, bodhi svāhā. :(Gone, gone, gone beyond, completely gone beyond, enlightenment, so be it!)
==Note== Google Gemini 2.5 Pro translation. Please check for errors.
[[Category:Buddhist texts]] [[en:Heart Sutra (interlinear translation)]] {{wikidata link|Q622868}} [[Category:Pages with 50+ untranslated japanese characters]] [[Category:Pages with 100+ untranslated japanese characters]] [[Category:Pages with 150+ untranslated japanese characters]] [[Category:Pages with 200+ untranslated japanese characters]] [[Category:Pages with 250+ untranslated japanese characters]]
